[[File:Rose JNM.png|thumb|150px|Rose in {{ma|Pokémon Journeys}}]]
Rose appeared in ''[[JNM13|Sword and Shield... The Legends Awaken! (Part 1)]]'' and ''[[JNM14|(Part 2)]]'', playing the same role as he does in {{aniseries|JN}}.
